name: GoHighLevel
one_liner: GoHighLevel (HighLevel) is an all-in-one CRM, marketing, and sales automation platform for agencies, exposing a REST API v2 covering contacts, conversations, calendars, opportunities, payments, and more.
access_notes: A free developer Marketplace account (marketplace.gohighlevel.com) lets you create an OAuth app and get client credentials with no human approval. However, making real API calls requires an active HighLevel account/sub-account (location) to authorize against; HighLevel is a paid SaaS offering a 14-day trial. Private Integration Tokens (PITs) are generated inside a GHL sub-account. No app-review gate for basic API use; app publishing is optional.
api_notes: REST API v2 documented on the developer portal (highlevel.stoplight.io / marketplace.gohighlevel.com/docs). Covers ~40 domains and hundreds of operations: Contacts, Conversations, Calendars & Events, Opportunities, Payments, Products, Invoices, Social Planner, Blogs, Emails, Forms, Locations, Custom Fields, etc. Rate limit ~100 requests/10s burst per app per resource. OAuth supports Location (sub-account) and Agency (company) level access.
mcp_notes: HighLevel ships an official LeadConnector MCP server at https://services.leadconnectorhq.com/mcp/ (Anthropic endpoint https://services.leadconnectorhq.com/mcp/anthropic/v2). Auth via OAuth (one-click) or Private Integration Token in the Authorization header plus location ID. Provides a unified toolset (search, fetch, search_operations, describe_operation, execute_operation) reaching hundreds of operations across 40 domains. Community MCP servers (e.g. mastanley13/GoHighLevel-MCP) also exist.
main_blocker: None major: public REST API with self-serve OAuth app creation. Only friction is needing an active HighLevel account (paid SaaS, trial available) to authorize and obtain tokens.

evidence.claim: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow with Location (sub-account) and Agency (company) level access; free developer Marketplace account via My Apps > Create App
Official LeadConnector MCP server is live, auth via OAuth or Private Integration Token, endpoint services.leadconnectorhq.com/mcp/, hundreds of operations across 40 domains
REST API v2 with OAuth 2.0 or Private Integration Token auth and webhook support for 50+ events
HighLevel officially introduced the MCP Server for AI agents

open_questions: Exact classification between SELF_SERVE_TRIAL vs SELF_SERVE_FREE depends on whether a fully free developer sandbox location grants working API credentials; API app creation is free but token authorization requires a live GHL account (trial available).
